content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Realty (+3.18%), Metal (+0.90%), Pharma (+0.86%), Energy (+0.67%) all leading; Nifty +0.56% and Bank Nifty +0.35%. India VIX 18.32 elevated but stable. Multiple Q4 catalysts driving stock-specific moves. Book is well-deployed at 52% with 10 names; focus is risk management on existing winners rather than fresh stacking.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held 0 days at +6.2%. SL already at 1035 (entry +5.2%) which locks in solid gain. CMP 1046.40 only 1.1% above SL - tightening further would risk premature stopout on noise. Keep current SL. No-op MODIFY avoided - stating HOLD essentially."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 2.2%, SL at 119 (~2.7% below CMP 122.36) intact. Defensive thesis still valid amid VIX 18.32 and geopolitical risk. Goldman target USD 4000/oz mid-2026. Hold to SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 1.8% with sector momentum (Pharma +0.86%). Current SL 23.85 is just below CMP 24.09 (~1% gap). This is essentially breakeven SL already. Keeping SL where it is - tightening more risks self-stopout on intraday noise (trail-gap discipline). No-op effectively, expressing as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 3.03% today on broader Q4-driven sector momentum. CMP 958.20, SL 950 (~0.85% below), Target 990. Stop is essentially at breakeven (entry 944, SL 950 is +0.6%) so downside is locked. Let it run toward 990 target. SL trail not appropriate - already at +0.6% from entry, moving higher would be too tight given 0.5% trail-gap rule (need SL ≤ 953 vs CMP 958)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +3.7% to 1722.50, hit intraday high 1748.60. SL at 1715 is essentially at entry (+0.9% from 1700). Faded from high to 1722 - the 1715 SL is 0.45% below CMP, slightly tight on trail-gap. Keeping current SL/target - no MODIFY needed. Effectively HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 0.4%, opened at 1590 high then sold off to 1538 - reversal pattern with 4.2x volume. Concerning that Internal Audit head resigned right before May 14 results. Watching closely - if breaks 1510 SL, exit. Holding for now as thesis on shipping rates intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 1.9%, gapped up to 13976 then faded to 13519. SL 13400 (1% below CMP) intact. Auto sector positive on April sales records, strong Buy consensus. Hold to SL or rebound; no tightening as we'd be too close to noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 0.6% but +4.96% on day with 8.2x volume - hit fresh 52w high at 212.66. SL 204 (~2% below CMP 208.14). Q4 turnaround thesis intact. Not tightening - 2% gap appropriate for high-vol momentum name."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +5.16% gap-up but faded to 4576 from high 4590. SL 4480 (~2% below). IAF Tejas Mk-1A review in May is binary catalyst pending. SL appropriate - not chasing tighter given binary risk could swing either way."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 1.0%, SL 488 (4.5% below CMP). Realty leading market today (+3.18%). Q4 results May 11 is binary catalyst within 5 sessions - per Rule 11, default disposition is risk-trim or tightened SL. Position is small (~5% of capital, ₹50.6k), already sized as event-trade. Holding with current SL acceptable for sub-5% position."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to +5.2% above entry, locking in most of the gain. Tighter SL would create self-stopout risk on intraday chop given CMP is only 1.1% above SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Position underwater 2.2% but still above SL. Defensive thesis intact amid elevated VIX."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "reasoning": "SL near breakeven; tighter SL would breach 0.5% trail-gap rule (CMP 24.09 vs SL 23.85 is ~1% which is tight already)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 950.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+. Position already protected. Letting target 990 work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+. ATH territory, momentum intact. Target 1790 within reach."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1510.00,
      "reasoning": "Audit head resignation timing is concerning. Watching for break of 1510. Board meeting May 14 binary."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 13400.00,
      "reasoning": "Position underwater but SL intact. Auto sector tailwind from record April sales. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "reasoning": "High-momentum 52w high name; need 2% breathing room for follow-through."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4480.00,
      "reasoning": "IAF Tejas review binary in May - keep current SL, not tightening into uncertain event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 488.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 11 (5 sessions out). Position is sub-5% of capital, sized as event-trade per Rule 11."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BAJAJ-AUTO, RRKABEL, BHEL, ADANIGREEN all showing strong momentum. RRKABEL Q4 (+33.7% revenue, +30% PAT) particularly strong with sector tailwind. Will reconsider on pullbacks. CONCORDBIO bearish per Citi cut - avoid. KOTAKBANK -5% post Q4 looks like opportunity but waiting for stabilization. LALPATHLAB had +12% spike then reversed sharply (1640→1571) - failed breakout, avoid.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is at 10 positions / 52% deployed. Multiple positions are in early innings of profit (PNBHOUSING +6.2%, BAJFINANCE +1.2%, ADANIPORTS +1.6%, ANANTRAJ +1.0%). Several at near-breakeven with SLs locked at or near entry - this is the right structure. ANANTRAJ has Q4 binary May 11 (within 3 trading sessions tomorrow); if position grows above 5% of capital, will need to trim or tighten SL. No new entries today - too many existing positions need monitoring and the watchlist setups (BAJAJ-AUTO +7.3%, BHEL +12%, HAL +5%, ADANIPORTS already held) are extended. Overall return +0.67% experiment-to-date; profit factor 3.4x in 5-day rolling - quality of trades is good."
}
